title: David Baumbach
compiled_truth: David Baumbach is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-19), David Baumbach sent 92 and received 1167 emails, totalling 1259 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (33), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (29), [Jim Schwieger](people/jim-schwieger) (15), [J  Farmer](people/j-farmer) (14), [Bryan Hull](people/bryan-hull) (11).
